_meta.description: Remove a user from a group in YeshID. Navigates to the group detail page, finds the user in the member list, and removes them.

group_name.description: Name of the group to remove the user from

user_identifier.description: Name or email of the user to remove from the group

_meta.warning: Destructive action — removes user from group. Verify group_name and user_identifier before running.
_meta.author: session-2026-04-14
anomalies: IMPORTANT: Groups feature requires Business plan on this YeshID account. Cannot be tested until plan is upgraded.
Remove action may be a row-level icon (trash/X) or a context menu per member row
May require hovering the member row to reveal the remove action
Confirmation dialog may or may not appear — perceive after click to verify

chain.note: Wait for groups list to render.
Bug 2 fix: Search for group first — do not rely on page 1 visibility.
Wait for group detail to load.
Perceive group detail. Identify member rows and the remove action (trash icon, X, or kebab menu per row).
Hover the member row to reveal inline action buttons (remove/delete icon).
Click the remove button revealed on the member row. Falls back to trash/X icon selectors scoped to the user row.
Brief wait to detect if a confirmation dialog appears.
Check if a confirmation dialog appeared after clicking remove.
If a confirmation dialog appeared, dismiss it. Enabled (unlike previous version which was disabled).
VERIFY: User must NOT appear in group member list. If this step fails (row still found), removal did not complete.

search-input.resolveHint: Input with class search-input and placeholder Search.

member-remove-button.resolveHint: Row-level remove button on the member row. May be a trash icon, X button, or kebab menu. Hover the member row to reveal.
